MAX FINANCIAL SERVICES LIMITED 
 
Corporate Office: Level 21, Max Towers, Sector 16B, Noida – 201301 
 
 
 
 
Max Financial Services Limited’s Earnings call 
Wednesday 10th November 2021 at 9:00 A.M. IST 
 
Noida, November 2, 2021 
 
 
Max Financial Services Limited, the holding company for Max Life Insurance 
business, is organizing a conference call for investors and analysts to discuss its 
Q2 FY22 results performance. The call is scheduled for Wednesday,10th 
November 2021 at 9:00 a.m. 
Senior Management team from Max Financial and Max Life will be present on the 
call. 
 
Details of the conference call 
 
Date 
• 
Wednesday, November 10, 2021 
Timing 
• 
9.00 a.m. India Time 
• 
11.30 a.m. Hong Kong / Singapore Time 
• 
3.30 a.m. London Time  
• 
10.30 p.m. New York Time (Tue, Nov 9) 

 
Pre-Registration 
Diamond Pass 
India Conference dial-in 
Primary Number 
• 
+91 22 6280 1141   
• 
+9122 7115 8042 
Conference dial-in – International 
Access (Toll Free Numbers) 
• 
USA: 1 866 746 2133 
• 
UK: 0 808 101 1573 
• 
Singapore: 800 101 2045 
• 
Hong Kong: 800 964 448 
Replay Facility 
• 
Available until November 17, 2021 on 
+91 71945757 
• 
Play Back ID – 21980 
 
- Ends - 
 
 
About Max Financial Services Limited 
Max Financial Services Limited (MFS), a part of the US$ 4 billion Max Group, is the parent 
company of Max Life, India’s largest non-bank, private life insurance company. MFS actively own 
and actively manages an 81.83% majority stake in Max Life Insurance Company Limited, making 
it India’s first listed company focused exclusively on life insurance. Max Life is a joint venture with 
Axis Bank, India’s third-largest private sector bank. 
 
For more information on the Company, please visit www.maxfinancialservices.com 
 
Investor Contact 
 
Mandeep Mehta 
Amrit Singh 
Chief Financial Officer 
Chief Financial Officer and EVP- Strategy 
Max Financial Services Limited

Tel: +91 0120 4696000 
Tel: +91 0124 41215000 Ext. 1013 
E-mail: mmehta@maxindia.com 
E-mail: amrit.singh2@maxlifeinsurance.com
